match.userMessage:

  "prompts": {

(Context: Where is the movement coming from?)
{
  "sceneId": "scene_4",
  "sceneNumber": 4,
  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "The camera rises with her as she stands. Wide 16:9 frame shows the newsroom bathed in bright, lifted light. Outside the window, rain softens into golden haze. She steps toward the live camera rig, mic clipped, ready.",
    "dialogue": []
  },
  "metadata": {
    "title": "Rise and Approach Broadcast Rig",
    "durationSeconds": 7,
    "location": "INT. MODERN NEWSROOM - GOLDEN HOUR",
    "timeOfDay": "golden hour",
    "storyBeat": "Reporter moves to go live position"
  },
  "prompts": {
    "visual": {
      "fullPrompt": "Modern social-first editorial photography in a wide 16:9 frame captures the starting moment inside an INT. MODERN NEWSROOM - GOLDEN HOUR where REPORTER with a #D4536D lipstick accent begins to rise from her chair and step forward. She stands with natural forward momentum toward the live camera rig fitted with (BROADCAST_MIC). The clean minimalist space features white desks and bleached wood floors under large windows streaked with fading rain that softens into golden haze outside. Bright lifted natural window light fills the room with airy highlights and soft directional shadows while warm golden tones blend with cool exterior haze. Shot from a slightly low dynamic handheld angle with shallow depth of field emphasizing the reporter and foreground rig against the softly blurred newsroom background.",
      "negativePrompt": "blurry motion, cartoonish effects, holographic displays, floating text, dark shadows, heavy diffusion, overexposed highlights, cluttered desks, non-minimalist decor",

        "environment": "INT. MODERN NEWSROOM - GOLDEN HOUR with white desks, bleached wood floors, large rain-streaked windows showing softening golden haze outside",
        "lighting": "bright lifted natural window light with golden hour warmth, soft directional shadows, airy highlights blending into exterior haze",
        "camera": "wide 16:9 handheld angle, slightly low perspective, shallow depth of field",
        "composition": "reporter centered in rising motion with broadcast rig in mid-ground and softly blurred newsroom behind",
        "style": "modern social-first editorial photography with clean bright color-matched tones and tactile realism",
        "technical": "sharp focus on subject and rig, high resolution 16:9, natural micro-movement feel",
        "atmosphere": "fresh, bright, professional newsroom energy with effortless cool and lifted lightness"
      }
    }
  },
  "continuity": {

    ],

<DIRECTOR_STYLE>
(Strictly apply camera movement and pacing preferences)
{
  "mood": "Fresh, sensory, and effortlessly cool",
  "artStyle": "Modern social-first product photography with tactile, editorial energy. Products shown in real-life context -- hands opening packaging, fingers pressing textures, products on bathroom shelves, kitchen counters, rumpled linen. Close-up detail shots emphasize material and finish. Flat-lays with curated minimal arrangements. Color-matched backgrounds that complement the product. Every frame feels like something you would screenshot and save",
  "lighting": "Bright natural window light with clean directional shadows. Direct on-camera flash for punchy editorial energy on select shots. No heavy diffusion -- let light feel real and immediate. Golden hour warmth for lifestyle moments. High-key and airy overall with pops of contrast",
  "colorPalette": [
    "#FFFFFF",
    "#F0E6D3",
    "#D4536D",
    "#1A1A1A",
    "#E8F4E8"
  ],
  "cameraWork": "Dynamic mix of handheld and locked shots with consistent energy. Handheld with natural micro-movement for lifestyle moments -- hands interacting, daily rituals, real context. Quick-cut to locked beauty frames for hero product shots. Macro details on textures and surfaces. Overhead flat-lays directly above. Eye-level and slightly above angles. Shallow depth of field on tactile details. Energetic pacing -- no lingering, every frame earns its time",
  "referenceFilms": [
    "Rhode Skin Instagram",
    "Glossier Visual Identity",
    "Summer Fridays Campaigns",
    "Drunk Elephant Content"
  ],
  "colorGrading": "Clean and bright with true-to-life color. Whites are crisp, skin tones warm and natural. Minimal processing -- the product looks like it does in your hand. Slight warmth in highlights, lifted shadows keeping everything airy. One accent color pops against neutral base"
}
</DIRECTOR_STYLE>

<ASPECT_RATIO>
16:9
</ASPECT_RATIO>
